name: n8n Workflow Skills
description: Comprehensive n8n workflow automation skill pack for AI assistants. Covers 545 n8n nodes and 20 curated workflow templates. Built on n8n-mcp architecture with five-layer modular TypeScript pipeline (collectors, parsers, organizers, generators, build scripts). Supports Claude Code, Claude.ai, and Claude Desktop.

findings_summary.notes: Well-structured TypeScript project (Oct 2025) for generating n8n skill packs. Clean source layout (src/analyzers, src/collectors, src/generators, src/organizers, src/parsers). Has CLAUDE.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, ATTRIBUTIONS.md — all in English and Traditional Chinese. Has proper Jest test config. SECURITY.md present indicating security awareness. ATTRIBUTIONS.md credits the n8n-mcp project this is built on. The project generates SKILL.md files with node documentation — no code execution at runtime. License is 'Other' (NOASSERTION) — this warrants attention but the ATTRIBUTIONS file suggests licensing is acknowledged. No hooks, no install scripts, no dangerous patterns. Note: actual star count (215) slightly higher than recorded (194).
